title: hieracium caledonicum subsp. veterascens
intro: Hieracium caledonicum subsp. veterascens, also known as the Scottish hawkweed, is a subspecies of plant belonging to the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. It is believed to offer various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Hieracium caledonicum subsp. veterascens can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is often used in traditional folk medicine, particularly in Scottish and European herbalism traditions.
